.md.notes: Best format; heading-based segmentation works well

.pdf.notes: pdfminer.six page-level extraction; quality varies by PDF

source_family_rules.case: Segment by heading (Introduction, Facts, Analysis, Holding, etc.)
source_family_rules.casebook: Segment by chapter heading (H1) then by subheading (H2/H3)

chunking.notes: Prefer smallest authoritative unit; preserve legal meaning
